title: Abusable Substances (Young Persons) Ordinance 1994
text:
3        Offence of
supply of abusable substances

(1) It is an offence for a person of any age to
supply (whether or not by way of sale or for reward of any kind) or
to offer to supply an abusable substance-

    
(a)     to a person
under the age of eighteen years whom he knows, or has reasonable
cause to believe, to be under the age; or

     (b)     to a
person

          
(i)      
who is acting on behalf of a person under that age;
or

         
(ii)      
whom he knows, or has reasonable cause to believe, to be so
acting,

if in the case of either (a) or (b) he knows or
has reasonable cause to believe that the substance is, or its fumes
are, likely to be inhaled for the purpose of causing intoxication
by the person under the age of eighteen or any other person under
that age.

(2) It is an offence for a person of under the age
of eighteen years to inhale any abusable substance or its fumes for
the purpose of inducing intoxication in himself.

(3) A person convicted of an offence under this
section is liable to imprisonment for six months or a fine not
exceeding the maximum of level 5 on the standard scale.

(4) A police officer may arrest without warrant a
person whom he reasonably suspects to have committed an offence
under this section.

 

2       
Interpretation

In this Ordinance-

"abusable substances"
means any substance, other than
a controlled drug or intoxicating liquor, the inhalation of which
or of the fumes of which is capable of causing
intoxication;

"controlled drug" has the same meaning as it has in the
Misuse of Drugs Ordinance 1987;

"intoxicating liquor"
has the same meaning as it has
in the Licensing Ordinance 1994.

[Revision
w.e.f. 31/07/2017]

1        Short
title

This Ordinance may be cited as the Abusable
Substances (Young Persons) Ordinance 1994.

 

AN ORDINANCE To prohibit the supply to young
persons of certain intoxicants and the inhalation of those
substances or their fumes by young persons.

[DATE OF
COMMENCEMENT: 31ST AUGUST 1994]

Abusable Substances (Young Persons) Ordinance 1994
